_comment: Canonical D1–D7 behavioral signals — single source of truth. Names match the live NT8 HUD (hudLabel) and MERIDIAN.md §4. Edit here; pages import this file. Do NOT hardcode signal names/descriptions in pages.

signals.name: Revenge Entry
signals.short: Re-entering too quickly after a loss.

signals.name: Stop Manipulation
signals.short: Widening or moving your stop when the trade moves against you.

signals.name: Size Spike
signals.short: Position size exceeding your declared rule — heavier weight during losing streaks.

signals.name: Hold Bias
signals.short: Holding losing trades far longer than your winners — the loss-aversion "ride losers" pattern.

signals.name: Position Overstay
signals.short: Holding a losing trade past your historical tolerance — the "let losers run" pattern.

signals.name: Rule Violations
signals.short: Trading outside the rules you set in your own profile.

signals.name: Overtrading Pace
signals.short: Entry frequency accelerating past your normal session rhythm.
